system.effect: The psyker surrounds himself with a wall of roaring flame. All creatures within 2 metres suffer 1d10 + Psy Rating Energy damage with the Flame quality. The fire shield also provides AP equal to the psyker's Psy Rating against ranged attacks.

description.value: The psyker wraps himself in a protective shroud of roaring flame. Any creature that enters or begins its turn within 2 metres of the psyker suffers 1d10 + Psy Rating Energy damage with the Flame quality. The shield also provides Armour Points equal to the psyker's Psy Rating against all incoming ranged attacks.
